title: AsyncFunctionStatusesResponse
description: Schema for AsyncFunctionStatusesResponse in Nuix REST API

executeImmediate.description: List of AsyncFunctionStatus objects for Async functions which are queued to execute.

singleItemQueue.description: List of AsyncFunctionStatus object for Async functions which are in the single item queue.

paused.description: True if the task is paused.  False otherwise.

pausedBy.description: The auth token of the user that paused the task.

pausedUntil.description: The time the task is paused until.

totalRunningFunctions.description: The total number of running tasks.
